channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Tennis / Padel / Squash venues
channel.description: Latest tennis / padel / squash venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Pickleball Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

item.title: Pattaya Tennis Club
item.description: Multiple courts, coaching, equipment rental, social play nights.

item.title: Greta Sport Club Pattaya / Greta Farms
item.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

item.title: Tara Tennis Club
item.description: Pattaya tennis club. Stub — needs deep research.

item.title: Tos Tennis Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya tennis facility. Stub — needs deep research.

item.title: Siam Bayshore Resort (Tennis)
item.description: 3 outdoor hard tennis courts. Hotel-based facility, day visitors welcome.

item.title: Euro Badminton
item.description: Badminton courts plus pool and eating area. East Pattaya.

item.title: Diamond Badminton
item.description: Several courts available off Pattaya 3rd Road, South Pattaya.

item.title: Pattaya Tennis & Badminton Inter Club
item.description: Multiple courts: pickleball, badminton, tennis, table tennis. Multi-racquet facility.

item.title: Play Padel Pattaya
item.description: Dedicated padel club in Pratumnak. Pattaya's first dedicated padel venue.

item.title: Pattaya Sports Club
item.description: Multi-sport sports club with tennis and other facilities.

item.title: Pattaya Padel Club
item.description: Lakeside padel courts on Mabprachan Reservoir. Pattaya second padel facility alongside Play Padel.
